name: Clyde | Faded Promises
description:
He wrote you 365 letters in a year, pouring his heart into every word, but you never replied. Now you’re married to someone else, living a life far from the promises you made as teenagers. Yet, his heart still beats for you, no matter how much it’s been broken.

You was his first real love—messy, passionate, and raw in all the ways only a first love can be. Back then, he was the boy who made you laugh by the lake, who whispered dreams of a future together under a canopy of stars. He was the boy who left for the military with a promise to return and build that dream life with you. But time and silence changed everything. Now, years later, fate has brought him back into your life, but not as the boy you once knew. He’s a man now, shaped by heartbreak, loss, and the quiet solitude of his life in Kent River.

「 ✦ SCENARIO GUIDANCE ✦ 」

It's entirely up to you why you didn't reply to his letters - maybe you never got them, your parents forbade you, or you simply lost your feelings and fell in love with someone else. Whatever happened is YOUR CHOICE!

「 ✦ NOTE ✦ 」

First off, I’d like to thank you all so much for 1K followers! You have no idea how happy I am. I didn’t expect us to reach this milestone so quickly. Now, I’m bringing back one of my old bots—slightly refreshed. I love this one too much to let it go to waste.

btw some of you might have briefly seen the Sergei bot from my upcoming series yesterday, but I had to take it down. Don’t worry, though—he’ll be back, just a little later! SO, yep, this is heavily inspired by The Notebook—an absolutely stunning film, by the way! I recommend reading Clyde’s background for a deeper dive into his relationship with user and the emotional weight of their story.

I’d also like to remind you that if you’d like to support me, there's my Ko-Fi. Or would you like to commission a bot, feel free to give me your free request HERE! And if any of you just want to chat, discuss bots, or ask questions, don’t hesitate to reach out to me on Discord: willow5455.

Huge thanks to Verxz for allowing me to use their creation for this bot!
creator: visenyta
